command.description: Shell command string. Passed to /bin/sh -c, so all shell features (pipes, redirects, globs, command substitution) work.

directory.description: Absolute path of a directory inside connect.working_dir to chdir to before running the command. Must exist and be a directory. Required on every call — an empty or omitted value is rejected with a tool error. Rejected with a tool error if outside working_dir, non-absolute, nonexistent, or reached through a symlink that points outside working_dir.

timeout.description: Override the per-call timeout (e.g. '5m', '30s'). Defaults to connect.timeout when omitted.

env.description: Per-call environment variable overrides. Merged on top of connect.env; per-call values win on key collision.
